title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS AND AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2381 / 50 OG No. 10, 4671 (October, 1954)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1200, September 02, 1954 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR PUBLIC WORKS AND AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINE HUNDRED AND TWENTY.

Itemized portion omitted for lack of space
